articles.description: Two-alarm brush fire near Indian Trail in Suffolk spreads amid shifting winds, prompting firefighter evacuation and threatening nearby properties; no injuries reported.

articles.title: 41°C heat index expected in two areas Sunday — Pagasa
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — The heat index is expected to reach up to 41°C in Sangley Point, Cavite City, and Zamboanga City on Sunday, according to the state weather bureau on Saturday afternoon. In its 5 p.m. bulletin, the Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical, and Astronomical Services Administration (Pagasa) classified these areas under the extreme caution category, with [...]... articles.title: Red Sox change start time of Sunday’s game vs. Tigers due to rain in forecast
articles.description: With the forecast calling for rain in Boston throughout the day Sunday, the Red Sox have moved the start time of their game with the Tigers back three hours.

articles.title: Farmer's Dog review: affordable fresh dog food that our pups love
articles.description: The Farmer's Dog is a fresh dog food delivery service that's cheaper than other brands. Here's why we recommend it after feeding it to our dogs.

articles.title: 500 fans turn Santiago into a Star Wars galaxy
articles.description: Star Wars fans gathered Saturday for the third edition of the “Parade of the Galaxies,” an event featuring a variety of cosplayers who showcased their best costumes along a main avenue in central Santiago.
